_comment: Scenario-staged rout demo (#473): the default 5v5 battle never reliably produces a single clean rout in a fixed clip, so this stages one directly. A lone, low-morale (25) player infantry unit of 60 faces a strong cavalry force (two 80-man cavalry) that hits it head-on -- the weak unit breaks and flees (shown faded), demonstrating a rout on demand. Camera frames the clash. No player input needed; the scenario + seed make it deterministic.
